zh.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Cruwys是Alexander De Cruwys和Miss De Lohereng的兒子，於大約1230年出生在英國英格蘭戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德。他於1265年與Matilda Fitz Payne在英國戴文可盧斯 莫爾哈德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年之前在英國戴文素斯 莫爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cruwys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cruse
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name probably from an unidentified place in Normandy named with Old French crues, crus, creus ‘hollow’. Creuse (in Somme, Picardy) and Cruys-Straëte (formerly in Flanders, now in the French département of Nord), which have the same etymology, are alternative possibilities but seem less likely on geographical and tenurial grounds.
English: perhaps a nickname from Middle English crus(e) ‘bold, fierce’, although the regular development would be to Crowse (rhyming with house).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Cruwys was born about 1230, in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England, United Kingdom as the son of Alexander De Cruwys and Miss De Lohereng. He married Matilda Fitz Payne in 1265, in Cruwys Morchard, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1316, in South Molton, Devon, England.

Il a épousé Matilda Fitz Payne en 1265, à Cruwys Morchard, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1316, à South Molton, Devon, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Cruwysは約1230年にイギリスイギリスデボンクルウイス モーチャードでAlexander De CruwysとMiss De Loherengの息子として生まれた。1265年にイギリスデボンクルウイス モーチャードでMatilda Fitz Payneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年以前にイギリスデボンソウス モルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Cruwys(은)는 대략 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크루w이스 모르처드에서 Alexander De Cruwys(와)과 Miss De Lohereng의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1265년 영국 데폰 크루w이스 모르처드에서 Matilda Fitz Payne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 이전 영국 데폰 소우스 모턴에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Cruwys родился около 1230 г. в местности крувис морчард, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Alexander De Cruwys и Miss De Lohereng. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Fitz Payne в 1265 г. в местности крувис морчард, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1316 г. в местности соут молтон, девон, Англия.
